# Paras Verma — Portfolio

This is the portfolio of Paras Verma, a full-stack web developer based in India (IST).

## Summary
- Builds interactive web applications with clean UI.
- Primary stack: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL.
- Availability: Available for freelance.

## Current Experience
- SDE Intern at Jspark AI (Nov 2025 - Present)
- Company: https://jspark.ai

## Skills
Next.js, React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Prisma ORM, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, Docker, Redux, Postman, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Git, GitHub

## Featured Projects
- ReviewScope: Automated AI code reviews with repository context.
  - Live: https://reviewscope.luffytaro.me
  - Source: https://github.com/Review-scope/ReviewScope
- CalMarshal: Event scheduling with Google Calendar integration.
  - Live: https://cal-marshal-phi.vercel.app
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/CalMarshal
- Dionysus: Executive AI assistant for meetings and code analysis.
  - Live: https://dionysus-zeta.vercel.app/
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/Dionysus
- Bolt New: Prompt-to-app generator for React applications.
  - Live: https://bolt-new-olive.vercel.app/
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/bolt.new
- DriveDeck: Automotive marketplace platform.
  - Live: https://drive-deck.vercel.app/
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/DriveDeck
